sourceMovie.title: The Purge: Election Year
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Purge: Election Year works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and horror blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Hunt
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Purge: Election Year clicked for you, The Hunt (2020) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Purge: Election Year?
faq.answer: Try The Hunt, The Forever Purge, The Wrath of Becky—each shares DNA with The Purge: Election Year while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Purge: Election Year?
faq.answer: The Purge: Election Year (2016) is best described as Action, Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Purge: Election Year part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Purge Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
